channel.title: SSMS on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in SSMS on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Agent mode for GitHub Copilot in SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS)
item.description:
GitHub Copilot Agent mode is now in public preview in SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS). It can help investigate performance issues, tune queries, review maintenance and configuration, identify security concerns, troubleshoot errors, and assist with operational tasks.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Database DevOps in SSMS powered by SQL projects
item.description:
SQL Database Projects are now in public preview in SSMS, bringing schema-as-code workflows for database development. The preview supports source-controlled schemas, repeatable deployments, and code quality checks in the development process.

  • Source: Azure Updates
